config.title: Kreator budżetów - Krok 2
config.script:
#include "50209"
function c##CTRLID_NAME##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl): c##CTRLID_NAME##_ongetdata=true oCtrl.text = container().m_strName end function
function c##CTRLID_NAME##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue):c##CTRLID_NAME##_ondataentered=false container().m_strName = oCtrl.text 'container().compose_full_name c##CTRLID_NAME##_ondataentered=true end function
function c##CTRLID_FULL_NAME##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl): c##CTRLID_FULL_NAME##_ongetdata=true container().compose_full_name oCtrl.text = container().m_strFullName 'container().make_table(page_.ctrl(CTRLID_TABLE)) end function
